error_specify_skill_disable: Error: Please specify the name of the skill to disable (e.g., /disable_skill create_txt_file)
warning_skill_not_found: Warning: Skill '{skill_name}' not found among active skills.
skill_disabled_success: Skill '{skill_name}' has been disabled for this session.
error_specify_agent_disable: Error: Please specify the name of the subagent to disable (e.g., /disable_agent log_analyzer)
warning_agent_not_found: Warning: Subagent '{agent_name}' not found in the colony.
error_specify_skill_enable: Error: Please specify the name of the skill to enable (e.g., /enable_skill create_txt_file)
skill_enabled_success: Skill '{skill_name}' has been enabled for this session.
error_specify_agent_enable: Error: Please specify the name of the subagent to enable (e.g., /enable_agent log_analyzer)
no_subagents_registered: No subagents registered in the colony.
no_subagents_colony: No subagents registered in this colony.
reload_success_message: Session reloaded! Found {skills_count} skills and {agents_count} active subagents.
save_error_no_name: Error: Please specify a name for the session (e.g. /save my_session)
load_error_no_name: Error: Please specify a session name to load (e.g. /load my_session)
